title: An AI model just helped build the next version of itself. MiniMax released M2.7, a coding agent that handles 30-50% of its own training workflow autonomously. → 56% on SWE-Pro, near top global models → 66.6% medal rate on ML research competitions → Fixes live production bugs in under 3 minutes → 97% skill adherence across 40+ complex tasks The trick: it runs experiments, reads logs, debugs failures, then rewrites its own code over 100+ iteration loops. You can now point it at a real codebase and let it plan, execute, and self-correct end-to-end without babysitting every step. https://opencode.ai/go
